entityName: The Dangers in My Heart Season 2

metadata.entityName: The Dangers in My Heart Season 2

ingredients.name: Senzoku Police Box
ingredients.localName: 荏原警察署 洗足駐在所
ingredients.address: 7 Chome-12-3 Koyama, Shinagawa City, Tokyo 142-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This police box near Senzoku station appears in Season 2 as a background landmark in the Senzoku neighborhood scenes, reflecting the everyday surroundings of Ichikawa's home turf where his daily commute and local errands are set.

ingredients.name: Shinagawa Station
ingredients.localName: 品川駅
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-26-27 Takanawa, Minato City, Tokyo 108-0074, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Shinagawa Station is the departure point for the class trip to Kyoto in Episode 13, where Ichikawa and Yamada share a charged platform moment as their relationship reaches its emotional peak during the final arc.

ingredients.name: SoLaDo Takeshita-dori
ingredients.localName: ソラド 竹下通り
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-8-2 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This shopping complex on Takeshita Street is where Anna Yamada's modeling shoots and fan meet-and-greet events take place in Episode 7, marking the spot where Ichikawa nervously watches the girl he loves in her element.

ingredients.name: TOHO Cinemas Shibuya
ingredients.localName: TOHOシネマズ 渋谷
ingredients.address: 渋東シネタワ, 2 Chome-6-17 Dogenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In Episode 5, Ichikawa and Yamada go to see a movie together at this Shibuya cinema, one of their early outings that blurs the line between friendship and something more for the anxious Ichikawa.

ingredients.name: Takeshita Street Entrance Arch (Harajuku Station)
ingredients.localName: 竹下通り 入口アーチ (原宿駅)
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-19-11 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The iconic arch entrance to Takeshita Street is featured in Episode 7 as the gateway to Anna Yamada's modeling world, where Ichikawa follows her into the bustle of Harajuku and glimpses a side of her he has never seen before.

ingredients.name: Tomod's Senzoku Ekimae Store
ingredients.localName: トモズ 洗足駅前店
ingredients.address: 青柳ビル, 2 Chome-6-9 Senzoku, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This drugstore near Senzoku station appears in the opening sequence as part of the familiar local streetscape Ichikawa walks through every day, grounding the story in the quiet residential rhythm of his neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Town Bakery Hasegawa
ingredients.localName: ハセパン
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-20-8 Haramachi, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0011, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The local bakery near the Senzoku area is shown in Episode 1 as a neighborhood spot that Ichikawa passes on his errands, capturing the ordinary domestic texture of his world before Yamada upends it.

ingredients.name: Ukigumo-enchi
ingredients.localName: 浮雲園地
ingredients.address: 23-2 Kasuganocho, Nara, 630-8212, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This park in Nara's deer-park area is a backdrop for the class trip scenes in Episode 12, where Ichikawa and Yamada navigate the crowds of tourists and sacred deer while their feelings for each other grow harder to hide.

ingredients.name: Yoshinoya Musashi-Koyama
ingredients.localName: 吉野家 武蔵小山店
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-21-14 Koyama, Shinagawa City, Tokyo 142-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Yoshinoya gyudon chain near Musashi-Koyama shows up in Episode 5 as one of the modest, everyday places Ichikawa frequents, contrasting sharply with the upscale Ebisu restaurants that appear in the same episode.

ingredients.name: Yamakiya Bedding Store
ingredients.localName: やまきや寝具店
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒164-0011 Tokyo, Nakano City, Central, 4 Chome−25−9
ingredients.entityContext: This bedding shop in the Senzoku neighborhood appears in Episode 6 as part of the residential back-streets Ichikawa navigates, a quiet slice of local life that underscores how ordinary his world is compared to Yamada's glamorous modeling career.

ingredients.name: 7-Eleven Ebisu America Bridge Store
ingredients.localName: セブン-イレブン 恵比寿アメリカ橋店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-25-1 Ebisuminami, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This convenience store near the America Bridge in Ebisu appears in Episode 5 during the Ebisu date sequence, where Ichikawa and Yamada stop for a spontaneous errand between the grand sights of Yebisu Garden Place.

ingredients.name: Able Meguro Senzoku
ingredients.localName: エーブル目黒洗足
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒152-0012 Tokyo, Meguro City, Senzoku, 1 Chome−21−2
ingredients.entityContext: This apartment building in Senzoku is referenced in Episode 1 as part of the neighborhood geography surrounding Ichikawa's home, establishing the quiet residential setting where his school life and home life intersect.

ingredients.name: Auguste Rodin Sculpture: "The Spirit of Eternal Rest"
ingredients.localName: 「永遠なる休息の精」オーギュスト・ロダン
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-13 Mita, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Rodin sculpture in Yebisu Garden Place is one of the landmarks Ichikawa and Yamada pass during their Episode 5 date, adding a layer of romantic atmosphere as they wander the elegant complex and Ichikawa struggles with his feelings.

ingredients.name: CANDEO HOTELS Hiroshima Hatchobori
ingredients.localName: カンデオホテルズ広島八丁堀
ingredients.address: 14-1 Hatchobori, Naka Ward, Hiroshima, 730-0013, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Candeo Hotel in Hiroshima is where Yamada and her parents stay during their Episode 9 family trip to the Hiroshima and Onomichi area, a trip that Ichikawa secretly finds out about and that deepens his understanding of her family life.

ingredients.name: Closet Child Harajuku
ingredients.localName: クローゼットチャイルド原宿１号店
ingredients.address: 原宿丸一ビル 2F,3F, 1 Chome-6-11 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This secondhand fashion shop on Takeshita-dori appears in Episode 7 as part of Anna Yamada's Harajuku domain, a stop in her world of fashion and modeling that Ichikawa nervously explores to get closer to understanding her.

ingredients.name: Ebisu Station
ingredients.localName: 恵比寿駅
ingredients.address: 1-chōme-5 Ebisuminami, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0022, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Ebisu Station is the transit hub for the pivotal Episode 5 date sequence, where Ichikawa and Yamada meet up and head together toward Yebisu Garden Place in what fans consider one of the most romantic outings of Season 2.

ingredients.name: FamilyMart Haramachi 2-chome store
ingredients.localName: ファミリーマート 原町二丁目店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-22-11 Haramachi, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0011, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This FamilyMart in Meguro City appears in Episode 4 as a neighborhood convenience store in the Senzoku-Meguro area, a mundane landmark that the series uses to anchor Ichikawa's everyday local world.

ingredients.name: Fushimi Inari Taisha
ingredients.localName: 伏見稲荷大社
ingredients.address: 68 Fukakusa Yabunouchicho, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0882, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The famous Fushimi Inari shrine in Kyoto is visited during the class trip in Episode 13, where Ichikawa and Yamada walk through the iconic torii gate tunnel together, a moment fans identify as the emotional climax of Season 2.

ingredients.name: Gastronomy “Joël Robuchon”
ingredients.localName: ガストロノミー “ジョエル・ロブション”
ingredients.type: グランメゾン（高級フランス料理店）
categories: グランメゾン（高級フランス料理店）
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒153-0062 Tokyo, Meguro City, Mita, 1 Chome−13−1, 恵比寿ガーデンプレイス内
ingredients.entityContext: The Joel Robuchon restaurant in Yebisu Garden Place is glimpsed during the Episode 5 Ebisu date as a symbol of the glamorous world that surrounds Ichikawa and Yamada during their outing, even if its Michelin prices are far beyond Ichikawa's budget.

ingredients.name: Ginkgo Street Dental Clinic
ingredients.localName: いちょう通り歯科医院
ingredients.address: プレミール洗足 101, 7 Chome-15-21 Koyama, Shinagawa City, Tokyo 142-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This dental clinic near Senzoku appears in Episode 1 as a building on the residential street that Ichikawa walks along, part of the detailed Senzoku neighborhood background that the anime faithfully reproduces.

ingredients.name: Grace Estate
ingredients.localName: グレースエステート
ingredients.address: Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Grace Estate apartment building near Senzoku appears in Episode 4 as a location in Ichikawa's home neighborhood, a background building that pilgrimage fans have identified as a recurring street-level detail.

ingredients.name: Hachiko Square
ingredients.localName: ハチ公前広場
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-1 Dogenzaka, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0043, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Hachiko Square outside Shibuya Station is featured in the opening sequence as one of Tokyo's most recognizable landmarks, used to establish the scale and energy of the city world that contrasts with Ichikawa's quiet Senzoku neighborhood.

ingredients.name: Idol On Stage
ingredients.localName: アイドルオンステージ
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒150-0001 Tokyo, Shibuya, Jingumae, 1 Chome−20−9 柴崎ビル
ingredients.entityContext: This photo shop on Takeshita Street in Harajuku appears in Episode 7 among the colorful storefronts of Anna Yamada's modeling turf, one of the vivid Takeshita-dori details that the anime reproduces with care.

ingredients.name: Inari Station
ingredients.localName: 稲荷駅
ingredients.address: Fukakusa Inarionmaechō, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0881, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Inari Station on the Kintetsu Kyoto Line is the stop the class uses to access Fushimi Inari Taisha in Episode 13, the small local station that marks the beginning of the finale's most emotionally charged sequence.

ingredients.name: Kiyomizu-dera
ingredients.localName: 清水寺
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-294 Kiyomizu, Higashiyama Ward, Kyoto, 605-0862, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Kiyomizu-dera temple in Kyoto is visited during the Episode 13 class trip, where Ichikawa and Yamada share a quiet moment on the famous wooden stage overlooking the city, a backdrop that underscores the bittersweet mood of their evolving relationship.

ingredients.name: Marion Crêpes Takeshita Street
ingredients.localName: マリオンクレープ 原宿竹下通り店
ingredients.address: ジュネスビル 1F, 1 Chome-6-15 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Marion Crepes on Takeshita Street appears in Episode 7 as one of the street-food landmarks of Anna Yamada's Harajuku world, a spot where she is perfectly in her element while Ichikawa tags along trying not to look too smitten.

ingredients.name: Meguro Fudoson
ingredients.localName: 目黒不動尊
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-20-26 Shimomeguro, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0064, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Meguro Fudoson temple appears in Episode 1 as a local landmark in the Meguro area, establishing the traditional neighbourhood texture of the city where Ichikawa's daily school commute takes him.

ingredients.name: Meguro Shinkin Bank Senzoku Branch
ingredients.localName: 目黒信用金庫 洗足支店
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-26-5 Senzoku, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This bank in Senzoku appears in Episode 6 as a street-level background detail in the neighborhood scenes, one of many real Senzoku landmarks the anime faithfully includes to ground Ichikawa's world in a specific Tokyo locale.

ingredients.name: Nara-miyage hyakka-shoten
ingredients.localName: 奈良みやげ百貨商店
ingredients.address: 23 Kasuganocho, Nara, 630-8212, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Nara souvenir shop near Ukigumo-enchi is visited during the class trip scenes in Episode 12, where students browse traditional deer-themed trinkets and Ichikawa quietly watches Yamada delight in the tourist experience.

ingredients.name: Nekonote Sightseeing Pier
ingredients.localName: ネコノテ観光業船着場
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-10-3 Tsuchido, Onomichi, Hiroshima 722-0035, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This small sightseeing pier in Onomichi, Hiroshima, appears in Episode 9 during the Onomichi arc, where scenery of the Seto Inland Sea plays a backdrop role as Yamada's family trip to the area unfolds.

ingredients.name: Onomichi Kyourakuen
ingredients.localName: 尾道 共楽園
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒722-0033 Hiroshima, Onomichi, Higashitsuchidocho, 13−17
ingredients.entityContext: Onomichi Kyourakuen park in Hiroshima appears in Episode 9 during the Onomichi family trip sequences, offering a scenic hillside setting that Yamada explores with her family while Ichikawa learns more about her life outside of school.

ingredients.name: Puratanasudori Bicycle
ingredients.localName: プラタナス自転車駐輪場付近
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-4-5 Mita, Meguro City, Tokyo 153-0062, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This bicycle parking area near the plane-tree-lined street in Yebisu Garden Place is featured in Episode 5 during the Ebisu date, a quietly romantic spot where Ichikawa and Yamada linger amid the European-styled plaza.

ingredients.name: Ramen Jiro Mita Honten
ingredients.localName: ラーメン二郎 三田本店
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-16-4 Mita, Minato City, Tokyo 108-0073, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The legendary Ramen Jiro flagship in Mita is mentioned or shown in Episode 9 as a nearby landmark, connecting to the Mita-Ebisu zone that the series frequently uses for Ichikawa's excursions and the couple's outings.

ingredients.name: Repark Senzoku 2-Chome
ingredients.localName: 三井のリパーク 洗足２丁目 駐車場
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-26-15 Senzoku, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: This Mitsui Repark car park in Senzoku appears in Episode 3 as a street-level background detail in the Senzoku neighborhood, one of the hyper-local references the anime uses to build the texture of Ichikawa's everyday environment.

ingredients.name: SWEETS PARADISE Harajuku
ingredients.localName: スイーツパラダイス 原宿店
ingredients.type: スイーツおよびデザート ビュッフェ
categories: スイーツおよびデザート ビュッフェ
ingredients.address: SoLaDo竹下通り 3F, 1 Chome-8-2 Jingumae, Shibuya, Tokyo 150-0001, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: SWEETS PARADISE on Takeshita Street appears in Episode 7 among the Harajuku venues tied to Yamada's world of modeling and fashion, a dessert buffet destination that fits the lively, indulgent atmosphere of the street.

ingredients.name: Senbon Torii (Thousand Torii Gates)
ingredients.localName: 千本鳥居
ingredients.address: 68番地 Fukakusa Yabunouchicho, Fushimi Ward, Kyoto, 612-0882, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Senbon Torii tunnel at Fushimi Inari is the visual centerpiece of the Episode 13 class trip scenes, the breathtaking corridor of vermilion gates where Ichikawa and Yamada walk side by side in what fans recall as the most iconic image of Season 2.

ingredients.name: Senzoku Sta.
ingredients.localName: 洗足駅
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-21 Senzoku, Meguro City, Tokyo 152-0012, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Senzoku Station is the neighborhood hub for Ichikawa's daily life, appearing throughout Season 2 as the transit point he uses every morning and the spot where chance encounters with Yamada sometimes happen in Episode 5 and beyond.
